title: SPiNDLE
description: Copper is life, overworld is full.
body:
Have you ever felt like Minecraft was lacking some good old rusty copper content? Is the content of the Copper Age drop just not RUSTY enough for you?? Well... uhh you could be in luck. Am not sure, though.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LbooR2rlXUc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Contents
### Features
More content is planned for future updates, stay tunned.
- Copper Horse
- Copper Frog
- Copper Wolf
- Copper Cat
- Copper... SHOTGUN?

The Copper Horse is summoned building a specific structure, check the Gallery for that.

# Frequent Issues
### Missing item textures
Make sure you download and enable the required resource pack to play with this data pack, you can find it by clicking in the version you want to download and scrolling down a bit. This isn't needed if you are using the mod version, as the resource pack is bundled with it.
### Creative mode
Datapacks are not able to add custom items or spawn eggs to the creative inventory. The following works for a lot of datapacks, including this one:
- To spawn items, use `/loot give @s loot <datapack>:items/<item>`
- To spawn mobs, use `/function <datapack>:commands/summon/<mob>`

#### Special thanks to the [Smithed](https://smithed.net/) community!
